text.title: test-fixtures Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-fixtures as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Mystery Guest: test data created invisibly in conftest or setUp, not visible in the test
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use factory fixtures with explicit parameters in each test instead.

failure-mode.description: God Fixture: one fixture creates everything the test suite needs
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Split into composable factory fixtures; tests request only what they need.

failure-mode.description: Using factory_boy Sequence without xdist-aware reset causes duplicate key errors
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each worker starts its counter at 0. Use factory.Sequence(lambda n: f"{worker_id}_{n}") or UUIDs as primary keys.
